---
title: "Daria Ardelean"
description-meta: "Personal website of Daria Ardelean"
image: "Profile Picture Daria.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 80%
  links:
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      href: https://phd.psy.unipd.it/people/daria-alexia-ardelean/
      target: _blank" 
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/dariaalexiaardelean
      target: _blank"} 
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/daria-ardelean-57a8b21b7/
      target: _blank"} 
    - icon: person-circle
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0009-2583-0362
      target: _blank"} 
---

:::{#hero-heading}

 I am a first year PhD student in Italy, at the University of Padova, Department of General Psychology. I am also one of the doctoral students at the Galilean School of Higher Education, in the Social Sciences Class. 
 
 My main research interests are in clinical neuropsychology and meta-science. I have recently joined the [Quantative Psychology Lab (QPLab)](https://dpg.unipd.it/en/qplab) at the University of Padova, and the [Open Neuropsychology Data Analysis Lab (ONDA Lab)](https://sancamilloirccs-ondalab.github.io/) at San Camillo IRCCS.

 Outside of academia, I am a registered clinical psychologist in Romania, currently undergoing training in psychotherapy.


:::
